declaration.source_result: A configured evaluator changed its output on the declared source-status contrast.
declaration.projected_outcome: The same configured evaluator will change in the reference-concordant direction on held-out templates more often than on matched nuisance transformations.
declaration.population: Held-out harmless-payload contrast sets generated from the declared template family
conditions: No target template inspected during declaration
declaration.time_version_scope: Evaluator fixture-v1 during the frozen Study B run

tolerance.criterion: Reference-concordant change rate minus nuisance-change rate
tolerance.success_threshold: Lower bound of the declared interval is greater than zero
tolerance.failure_threshold: Lower bound is zero or less

inquiry_use.intended_use: Diagnose selective behavioural sensitivity in the named evaluation configuration
inquiry_use.evidential_standard: Preregistered paired comparison with uncertainty and all exclusions reported
inquiry_use.uncertainty_treatment: Report the paired estimate, interval, unresolved cases, and family-level multiplicity
inquiry_use.minimum_useful_reach: At least one independently held-out template family

structural: Paired outcome vector retained without compensatory aggregation

world_side.profile_hypothesis: The configured evaluator is selectively sensitive to the manipulated source-status relation within the declared family.
evidence: Held-out paired comparisons under allowed transformations

prospective_failure_triggers: A nuisance transformation produces an equal or larger change
revision_rule.retirement_condition: Retire the family claim if no predeclared fallback clears the minimum useful reach on independent data.
